# luci module
> LuCI web interface framework: JavaScript client API for forms, UCI bindings, RPC, DOM, and UI widgets.
> **Total Context:** ~19723 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for luci that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~3027 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for luci when a larger context window is available. (~20416 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Source Documents

- [js_source-api-cbi.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-cbi.md): Implements the CBI declarative form framework for LuCI. (~3075 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-firewall.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-firewall.md): Implements the LuCI firewall abstraction over the nftables/iptables UCI config. (~262 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-form.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-form.md): Provides the first-class LuCI form rendering framework used by modern views. (~143 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-fs.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-fs.md): Provides the LuCI client-side filesystem API that proxies calls to the rpcd file plugin over HTTP. (~140 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-luci.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-luci.md): Defines the core LuCI JavaScript framework and application runtime. (~14614 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-protocol-static.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-protocol-static.md): Implements the LuCI protocol handler for static IP interfaces. (~217 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-tools-prng.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-tools-prng.md): Provides a lightweight pseudo-random number generator utility for the LuCI frontend. (~982 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-tools-widgets.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-tools-widgets.md): Provides reusable LuCI view-level widget helpers shared across multiple LuCI packages. (~126 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-uci.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-uci.md): Provides the LuCI JavaScript UCI binding that defers all reads and writes to batched rpcd calls. (~95 tokens, l2-source)
- [js_source-api-ui.md](./chunked-reference/js_source-api-ui.md): Provides the LuCI client-side UI widget and notification layer. (~69 tokens, l2-source)
